title: Bring Google Jamboard features to Monday docs
excerpt: Today, one of our customers was explaining an idea using Google Jamboard, I found it useful and it will be cool if Monday docs could have more features like the ones found a Jamboard menu.

posts.author: Vegonik (VERONICA MARIA POMPA ACUNA)
posts.cookedHtml:
Today, one of our customers was explaining an idea using Google Jamboard, I found it useful and it will be cool if Monday docs could have more features like the ones found a Jamboard menu.
